title: lithocarpus laoticus var. laoticus
intro: Lithocarpus laoticus var. laoticus, also known as Laos tanbark oak, is a plant species in the beech family Fagaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus laoticus var. laoticus typically involve decoctions or infusions made from its bark or leaves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
